FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

Your Service Deserves a Secure Retirement

Federal employees have one of the best benefits packages in the country — but maximizing FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB requires specialized expertise most advisors don't have. We speak your language.

FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

The Federal Architecture of Retirement

Your decades of service have earned you one of the most comprehensive benefits packages in America. Our expertise ensures you maximize every dollar of FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB in coordination.

500+ Federal Employees Served
$3,200 Avg FEGLI Savings/Year
95% Client Satisfaction
CHAPTER I: EXPLORE FEDERAL BENEFITS

Seven Pillars of Federal Retirement

Each benefit requires specialized expertise. Click any module for in-depth guidance, calculators, and optimization strategies.

MODULE 01

FERS Retirement

The foundation of your federal retirement. Pension calculations, optimal retirement dates, and FERS supplement bridge planning.

  • Precise annuity calculations
  • MRA optimization
  • Survivor benefit analysis
  • Military buyback evaluation
Explore FERS →
MODULE 02

TSP Planning

Maximize your Thrift Savings Plan with optimal allocation, contribution strategies, and tax-efficient withdrawals.

  • Fund allocation strategy
  • Roth vs traditional analysis
  • Withdrawal optimization
  • Rollover decisions
Optimize TSP →
MODULE 03

FEGLI Analysis

Most federal employees are over-insured. We analyze your life insurance needs and compare FEGLI with private alternatives.

  • Coverage needs analysis
  • Cost comparison studies
  • Private insurance quotes
  • Beneficiary optimization
Analyze FEGLI →
MODULE 04

FEHB Coordination

Navigate health benefits into retirement, Medicare coordination, and plan selection optimization.

  • Medicare coordination
  • Plan selection guidance
  • 5-year rule compliance
  • FSA strategies
Plan FEHB →
MODULE 05

Social Security

Coordinate Social Security with your FERS pension and bridge the gap with FERS supplement planning.

  • FERS supplement bridge
  • WEP/GPO eliminated benefits
  • Optimal claiming strategy
  • Spousal coordination
Optimize SS →
MODULE 06

FERS Calculator

Calculate your FERS annuity based on years of service, high-3 salary, and retirement date scenarios.

  • Instant annuity estimates
  • Retirement date comparison
  • Supplement projections
  • Survivor benefit impact
Calculate Now →
MODULE 07

Retirement Checklist

A comprehensive timeline from 5 years out to your last day. Don't leave anything on the table.

  • 5-year preparation timeline
  • Application deadlines
  • Document requirements
  • Final day procedures
Get Checklist →
CHAPTER II: CALCULATE YOUR FUTURE

Know Your Numbers

Your FERS annuity calculation is complex — years of service, high-3 salary, special provisions, and retirement date all matter. Get your personalized estimate.

Calculate My FERS Annuity →
CHAPTER III: THE GAP

Why Federal Employees Need Specialized Help

Most financial advisors have never worked with a federal employee. They don't understand FERS calculations, TSP withdrawal strategies, or how to coordinate your benefits package. This knowledge gap costs federal retirees thousands.

"HR can help you understand your benefits, but they can't advise you on financial strategy. Most advisors understand investing, but they've never seen a FERS annuity calculation. We bridge that gap."

From Mike's book "Retire Right, Retire Now" — the stories of Linda, David, and Rachel show how costly mistakes happen when federal employees work with generalist advisors who don't understand the unique complexity of federal benefits.

CHAPTER IV: OUR PROCESS

How We Work with Federal Employees

A specialized approach that coordinates every piece of your federal benefits package.

01

Benefits Analysis

We review your SF-50, TSP statement, FEGLI coverage, and FEHB options to understand your complete federal benefits package and retirement eligibility.

02

Retirement Modeling

Project your FERS annuity, Social Security, TSP withdrawals, and taxes under different retirement scenarios to identify your optimal retirement date.

03

Integrated Strategy

Coordinate all federal benefits with your outside assets into a comprehensive retirement income and tax optimization plan.

CHAPTER V: GETTING STARTED

Your Service Deserves Expertise

You've dedicated your career to public service. Let us dedicate our expertise to maximizing your federal retirement benefits.

Schedule Your Federal Benefits Review →
